name: Pipeline: Key Items Extract
description: Sub-workflow: extract key items (people, projects, tools, concepts, decisions, resources) from minutes.

parameters.jsCode:
const wb = $('Set Metadata').first().json.body;
const meetingName = wb.meeting_name || 'Meeting';
const minutes = $('Set Metadata').first().json.minutes || '';

const systemPrompt = 'You extract structured key items from meeting minutes into a companion reference note.
Output ONLY valid markdown with no preamble or explanation.
Be factual — use only what is explicitly in the minutes.
Wikilink items: people [[Lastname Firstname]] (family name first, ALWAYS reorder — e.g. "Johanna Aivio" becomes [[Aivio Johanna]]; ONLY if both names known; first-name-only = plain text), projects [[Project Name]], tools [[Tool Name]], concepts [[Concept]], resources [[Resource Name]]. Named items become atomic notes via /propagate.
One sentence max per item. Omit sections with no content.';

const sections = '## People
Each person mentioned with role/context: - **[[Name]]** — role

## Projects & Initiatives
- **[[Project Name]]** — description, status

## Tools & Technologies
- **[[Tool Name]]** — usage context

## Concepts & Terms
- **[[Term]]** — definition or context

## Resources & References
- **[[Resource]]** — context';

const userMsg = 'Extract key items from these meeting minutes. Use the headings below; omit any section with no content.

' + sections + '

---
MEETING MINUTES:
' + minutes;

return [{ json: { body: JSON.stringify({
    model: 'qwen3.5:27b-32k',
    stream: false,
    think: false,
    num_ctx: 8192,
    system: systemPrompt,
    prompt: userMsg
}) } }];
